description: Style NoteWith its classic styling this shirt from myntra is a piece that will easily slot into your daily wear wardrobe. Made of pure cotton this shirt lets you stay comfortable even on sunny days. Pair it with crisp trousers and pumps for a look that exudes complete control and confidence.Product DetailsYellow shirt, spread collar, cap sleeves with binding, full buttoned placket, yoke at back and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldWarm iron Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
